title: AN ACT CREATING CERTAIN BARRIOS IN THE SECOND DISTRICT OF THE PROVINCE OF BATANGAS.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3444 / 57 OG No. 8, 1374 (February 20, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2825, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT CREATING CERTAIN BARRIOS IN THE SECOND DISTRICT OF THE PROVINCE OF BATANGAS.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The following sitios in the Municipality of Bauan, Province of Batangas, are constituted as barrios therein, to wit:

The sitio of Look is separated from barrio Culbo and the sitio of Look is separated from barrio Magalangalang, and are constituted into a distinct and independent barrio, to be known as the barrio of Bagong Silang; and

The sitios of Tubuhan and San Gelacio are separated from the barrio of Malaking Pook, and constituted into a distinct and independent barrio, to be known as the barrio of Resplandor.

The sitio of Saimsim is separated from barrio Haliguing Kanluran, the sitio of Igat is separated from barrio Simlong, and the sitio of Piit is separated from barrio Pinamucan, and are constituted into a distinct and independent barrio, to be known as the barrio of Pinamucan Silañgan.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
